content.text:
1. Blocker | Critical-action dual approval does not enforce required cross-role segregation
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/CriticalActionService.java:115, :135, backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/security/RolePermissionMatrix.java:55, :64, :91, frontend/src/app/app.routes.ts:25
   Impact: Any two distinct approvers with approval permission can complete protected actions.
2. High | Check-in evidence timestamps and coordinates are user-editable and server-trusted
   Evidence: frontend/src/app/features/check-ins/check-ins-page/check-ins-page.component.html:31, :41, ...component.ts:51, :69, backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/CheckInService.java:99, :124
   Impact: Compliance evidence can be falsified before submission.
3. High | Protected order cancellation bypasses order traceability history
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/CriticalActionService.java:171, backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/OrderService.java:447, :484
   Impact: Compliance-critical lifecycle changes can be missing from order history/timeline.
4. Medium | Duplicate payment recording can degrade into a generic 500
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/OrderService.java:222, backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V3__procurement_order_lifecycle.sql:53, backend/src/test/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/integration/IdempotencyIntegrationTest.java:125
   Impact: Repeated finance actions can hit a DB constraint and return an uncontrolled server error.
5. Medium | Discrepancy confirmation is not enforced for all quantity mismatches
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/OrderService.java:307, :321, frontend/src/app/features/orders/receipts/receipts.component.ts:68, ...component.html:50
   Impact: Short receipts can be submitted without the prompt-required discrepancy confirmation path.
6. Medium | Watermarking is only a client-side preview overlay, not part of served document content
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/service/DocumentCenterService.java:323, :329, frontend/src/app/features/documents/document-center/document-preview-dialog.component.html:14, ...document-center.component.html:216, README.md:212
   Impact: Downloaded/raw document artifacts are unwatermarked despite stronger product/docs claims.
7. Medium | Backend integration coverage omits the document center and check-in modules
   Evidence: backend/src/test/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/integration/AuthControllerIntegrationTest.java:14, OrderControllerIntegrationTest.java:16, CriticalActionControllerIntegrationTest.java:17, RateLimitIntegrationTest.java:17, frontend/e2e/cross-role-order-workflow.spec.ts:42, frontend/e2e/document-and-checkin-flow.spec.ts:24
   Impact: Serious auth, validation, scope, and upload defects in those modules could go undetected.
8. Medium | Docker runtime rate limit is materially weaker than the code/test default
   Evidence: backend/src/main/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/security/RateLimitFilter.java:39, docker-compose.yml:30, :31, backend/src/test/java/com/pharmaprocure/portal/integration/RateLimitIntegrationTest.java:54
   Impact: Delivered runtime config weakens abuse protection compared with the intended/tested limit

**Assessing user issues**

It seems like the user provided a list of issues that might require a review. I think they could be implicitly asking for fixes, so my assumption is that they want code changes. I need to evaluate and see how many issues I can feasibly address, but first, I should inspect the code. It’s going to be a complex, multi-step process, so I’ll probably use a to-do list to manage everything effectively. I need to start with a commentary update before diving into the work.

**Planning test strategies**

I’m considering using Bash for the tests, but I’m also thinking about the integrated verification skill—though it might not be necessary at this point. I’ll go ahead and send a progress update to keep things transparent. Plus, I need to create a to-do list to organize my tasks going forward. Having everything outlined will help me manage my work more effectively. Let’s make sure to keep everything on track!
Inspecting the cited backend and frontend paths first so I can verify each finding against the current implementation and make the smallest safe fixes.

<content>1: package com.pharmaprocure.portal.service;
2: 
3: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.dto.CriticalActionDtos.CreateCriticalActionRequest;
4: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.dto.CriticalActionDtos.CriticalActionApprovalResponse;
5: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.dto.CriticalActionDtos.CriticalActionAuditResponse;
6: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.dto.CriticalActionDtos.CriticalActionRequestResponse;
7: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.CriticalActionApprovalEntity;
8: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.CriticalActionRequestEntity;
9: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.DocumentEntity;
10: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.ProcurementOrderEntity;
11: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.UserEntity;
12: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.DataScope;
13: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionAuditAction;
14: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionDecision;
15: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionRequestType;
16: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionStatus;
17: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionTargetType;
18: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.DocumentStatus;
19: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.OrderStatus;
20: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.exception.ApiException;
21: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.CriticalActionApprovalRepository;
22: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.CriticalActionAuditEventRepository;
23: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.CriticalActionRequestRepository;
24: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.DocumentRepository;
25: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.ProcurementOrderRepository;
26: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.security.Permission;
27: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.security.PermissionAuthorizationService;
28: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.security.UserPrincipal;
29: import java.time.OffsetDateTime;
30: import java.util.List;
31: import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
32: import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
33: import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
34: import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;
35: 
36: @Service
37: public class CriticalActionService {
38: 
39:     private final CriticalActionRequestRepository requestRepository;
40:     private final CriticalActionApprovalRepository approvalRepository;
41:     private final CriticalActionAuditEventRepository auditRepository;
42:     private final CurrentUserService currentUserService;
43:     private final CriticalActionAuditService auditService;
44:     private final ProcurementOrderRepository orderRepository;
45:     private final DocumentRepository documentRepository;
46:     private final PermissionAuthorizationService permissionAuthorizationService;
47: 
48:     public CriticalActionService(
49:         CriticalActionRequestRepository requestRepository,
50:         CriticalActionApprovalRepository approvalRepository,
51:         CriticalActionAuditEventRepository auditRepository,
52:         CurrentUserService currentUserService,
53:         CriticalActionAuditService auditService,
54:         ProcurementOrderRepository orderRepository,
55:         DocumentRepository documentRepository,
56:         PermissionAuthorizationService permissionAuthorizationService
57:     ) {
58:         this.requestRepository = requestRepository;
59:         this.approvalRepository = approvalRepository;
60:         this.auditRepository = auditRepository;
61:         this.currentUserService = currentUserService;
62:         this.auditService = auditService;
63:         this.orderRepository = orderRepository;
64:         this.documentRepository = documentRepository;
65:         this.permissionAuthorizationService = permissionAuthorizationService;
66:     }
67: 
68:     @Transactional
69:     public Page<CriticalActionRequestResponse> list(Pageable pageable, CriticalActionStatus statusFilter) {
70:         UserEntity actor = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
71:         DataScope scope = permissionAuthorizationService.requireDataScope(actor, Permission.CRITICAL_ACTION_VIEW);
72:         Long requestedById = (scope == DataScope.SELF) ? actor.getId() : null;
73:         String orgCode = (scope == DataScope.ORGANIZATION) ? actor.getOrganizationCode() : null;
74:         Page<CriticalActionRequestEntity> requests = requestRepository.findFiltered(requestedById, orgCode, statusFilter, pageable);
75:         return requests.map(request -> {
76:             expireIfNeeded(request);
77:             return toResponse(request);
78:         });
79:     }
80: 
81:     @Transactional
82:     public CriticalActionRequestResponse create(CreateCriticalActionRequest request) {
83:         UserEntity actor = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
84:         CriticalActionRequestType requestType = CriticalActionRequestType.valueOf(request.requestType());
85:         CriticalActionTargetType targetType = CriticalActionTargetType.valueOf(request.targetType());
86:         validateTarget(requestType, targetType, request.targetId(), actor);
87:         requestRepository.findByRequestTypeAndTargetTypeAndTargetIdAndStatusIn(requestType, targetType, request.targetId(), List.of(CriticalActionStatus.PENDING, CriticalActionStatus.PARTIALLY_APPROVED))
88:             .ifPresent(existing -> { throw new ApiException(400, "Active critical action request already exists", List.of("requestId=" + existing.getId())); });
89: 
90:         CriticalActionRequestEntity entity = new CriticalActionRequestEntity();
91:         entity.setRequestType(requestType);
92:         entity.setTargetType(targetType);
93:         entity.setTargetId(request.targetId());
94:         entity.setJustification(request.justification());
95:         entity.setRequestedBy(actor);
96:         entity.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.PENDING);
97:         entity.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
98:         entity.setExpiresAt(OffsetDateTime.now().plusHours(24));
99:         entity = requestRepository.save(entity);
100:         auditService.record(entity, actor, CriticalActionAuditAction.REQUESTED, request.justification());
101:         return toResponse(entity);
102:     }
103: 
104:     @Transactional
105:     public CriticalActionRequestResponse decide(Long requestId, CriticalActionDecision decision, String comments) {
106:         UserEntity actor = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
107:         CriticalActionRequestEntity request = requireRequest(requestId, actor, Permission.CRITICAL_ACTION_VIEW);
108:         expireIfNeeded(request);
109:         if (request.getStatus() == CriticalActionStatus.EXPIRED) {
110:             throw new ApiException(400, "Critical action request has expired", List.of("requestId=" + requestId));
111:         }
112:         if (request.getStatus() == CriticalActionStatus.EXECUTED || request.getStatus() == CriticalActionStatus.REJECTED) {
113:             throw new ApiException(400, "Critical action request is already resolved", List.of(request.getStatus().name()));
114:         }
115:         if (approvalRepository.findByRequestIdAndApproverUserId(requestId, actor.getId()).isPresent()) {
116:           throw new ApiException(400, "The same user cannot approve twice", List.of("SAME_USER_REJECTION"));
117:         }
118: 
119:         CriticalActionApprovalEntity approval = new CriticalActionApprovalEntity();
120:         approval.setRequest(request);
121:         approval.setApproverUser(actor);
122:         approval.setDecision(decision);
123:         approval.setComments(comments);
124:         approval.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
125:         approvalRepository.save(approval);
126: 
127:         if (decision == CriticalActionDecision.REJECT) {
128:             request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.REJECTED);
129:             request.setResolvedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
130:             request.setResolutionNote(comments == null ? "Rejected" : comments);
131:             auditService.record(request, actor, CriticalActionAuditAction.REJECTED, comments);
132:             return toResponse(request);
133:         }
134: 
135:         List<CriticalActionApprovalEntity> approvals = approvalRepository.findByRequestIdOrderByCreatedAtAsc(requestId);
136:         if (approvals.size() == 1) {
137:             request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.PARTIALLY_APPROVED);
138:             auditService.record(request, actor, CriticalActionAuditAction.APPROVED, "First approval recorded");
139:         } else if (approvals.size() >= 2) {
140:             request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.APPROVED);
141:             request.setResolvedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
142:             request.setResolutionNote("Two distinct approvals recorded");
143:             auditService.record(request, actor, CriticalActionAuditAction.APPROVED, "Second approval recorded");
144:             execute(request, actor);
145:         }
146:         return toResponse(request);
147:     }
148: 
149:     @Transactional
150:     public CriticalActionRequestResponse get(Long requestId, UserPrincipal principal) {
151:         UserEntity actor = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
152:         if (!actor.getId().equals(principal.id())) {
153:             throw new ApiException(403, "Access denied", List.of("AUTH_CONTEXT_MISMATCH"));
154:         }
155:         CriticalActionRequestEntity request = requireRequest(requestId, actor, Permission.CRITICAL_ACTION_VIEW);
156:         expireIfNeeded(request);
157:         return toResponse(request);
158:     }
159: 
160:     private void execute(CriticalActionRequestEntity request, UserEntity actor) {
161:         switch (request.getRequestType()) {
162:             case ORDER_CANCELLATION_AFTER_APPROVAL -> executeOrderCancellation(request, actor);
163:             case DOCUMENT_DESTRUCTION -> executeDocumentDestruction(request, actor);
164:             case RETENTION_OVERRIDE -> executeRetentionOverride(request, actor);
165:         }
166:         request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.EXECUTED);
167:         request.setResolvedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
168:         auditService.record(request, actor, CriticalActionAuditAction.EXECUTED, request.getRequestType().name());
169:     }
170: 
171:     private void executeOrderCancellation(CriticalActionRequestEntity request, UserEntity actor) {
172:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = orderRepository.findWithItemsById(request.getTargetId())
173:             .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Order not found", List.of("orderId=" + request.getTargetId())));
174:         order.setCurrentStatus(OrderStatus.CANCELED);
175:         order.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
176:     }
177: 
178:     private void executeDocumentDestruction(CriticalActionRequestEntity request, UserEntity actor) {
179:         DocumentEntity document = documentRepository.findWithCurrentVersionById(request.getTargetId())
180:             .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Document not found", List.of("documentId=" + request.getTargetId())));
181:         document.setStatus(DocumentStatus.DESTROYED);
182:         document.setDestroyedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
183:         document.setDestroyedBy(actor);
184:         document.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
185:     }
186: 
187:     private void executeRetentionOverride(CriticalActionRequestEntity request, UserEntity actor) {
188:         DocumentEntity document = documentRepository.findWithCurrentVersionById(request.getTargetId())
189:             .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Document not found", List.of("documentId=" + request.getTargetId())));
190:         document.setRetentionOverrideUntil(OffsetDateTime.now().plusDays(365));
191:         document.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
192:     }
193: 
194:     private void validateTarget(CriticalActionRequestType requestType, CriticalActionTargetType targetType, Long targetId, UserEntity actor) {
195:         switch (requestType) {
196:             case ORDER_CANCELLATION_AFTER_APPROVAL -> {
197:                 if (targetType != CriticalActionTargetType.ORDER) {
198:                     throw new ApiException(400, "Invalid target type for order cancellation", List.of(targetType.name()));
199:                 }
200:                 ProcurementOrderEntity order = orderRepository.findWithItemsById(targetId)
201:                     .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Order not found", List.of("orderId=" + targetId)));
202:                 boolean allowed = permissionAuthorizationService.canAccessResource(
203:                     actor,
204:                     Permission.CRITICAL_ACTION_REQUEST,
205:                     order.getBuyer().getId(),
206:                     order.getBuyer().getRole().getName(),
207:                     order.getBuyer().getOrganizationCode()
208:                 );
209:                 if (!allowed) {
210:                     throw new ApiException(403, "Access denied", List.of("ORDER_SCOPE_RESTRICTION"));
211:                 }
212:                 if (order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.APPROVED && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.PAYMENT_RECORDED && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.PICK_PACK && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.SHIPPED) {
213:                     throw new ApiException(400, "Only approved or fulfilled orders require critical cancellation", List.of(order.getCurrentStatus().name()));
214:                 }
215:             }
216:             case DOCUMENT_DESTRUCTION, RETENTION_OVERRIDE -> {
217:                 if (targetType != CriticalActionTargetType.DOCUMENT) {
218:                     throw new ApiException(400, "Invalid target type for document action", List.of(targetType.name()));
219:                 }
220:                 DocumentEntity document = documentRepository.findWithCurrentVersionById(targetId)
221:                     .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Document not found", List.of("documentId=" + targetId)));
222:                 boolean allowed = permissionAuthorizationService.canAccessResource(
223:                     actor,
224:                     Permission.CRITICAL_ACTION_REQUEST,
225:                     document.getOwnerUser().getId(),
226:                     document.getOwnerUser().getRole().getName(),
227:                     document.getOwnerUser().getOrganizationCode()
228:                 );
229:                 if (!allowed) {
230:                     throw new ApiException(403, "Access denied", List.of("DOCUMENT_SCOPE_RESTRICTION"));
231:                 }
232:             }
233:         }
234:     }
235: 
236:     private CriticalActionRequestEntity requireRequest(Long requestId, UserEntity actor, Permission permission) {
237:         CriticalActionRequestEntity request = requestRepository.findById(requestId)
238:             .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Critical action request not found", List.of("requestId=" + requestId)));
239:         boolean allowed = permissionAuthorizationService.canAccessResource(
240:             actor,
241:             permission,
242:             request.getRequestedBy().getId(),
243:             request.getRequestedBy().getRole().getName(),
244:             request.getRequestedBy().getOrganizationCode()
245:         );
246:         if (!allowed) {
247:             throw new ApiException(403, "Access denied", List.of("CRITICAL_ACTION_SCOPE_RESTRICTION", "requestId=" + requestId));
248:         }
249:         return request;
250:     }
251: 
252:     private void expireIfNeeded(CriticalActionRequestEntity request) {
253:         if ((request.getStatus() == CriticalActionStatus.PENDING || request.getStatus() == CriticalActionStatus.PARTIALLY_APPROVED) && request.getExpiresAt().isBefore(OffsetDateTime.now())) {
254:             request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.EXPIRED);
255:             request.setResolvedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
256:             request.setResolutionNote("Expired after 24 hours without two approvals");
257:             auditService.record(request, request.getRequestedBy(), CriticalActionAuditAction.EXPIRED, request.getResolutionNote());
258:         }
259:     }

<content>180:     }
181: 
182:     @Transactional
183:     public OrderDetailResponse cancelOrder(Long orderId) {
184:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_CREATE);
185:         if (order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.APPROVED || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.PAYMENT_RECORDED || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.PICK_PACK || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.SHIPPED || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.RECEIVED || order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.RETURNED) {
186:             throw new ApiException(400, "Approved or fulfilled orders cannot be canceled directly", List.of("Dual approval will be required in a later phase"));
187:         }
188:         OrderStatus from = order.getCurrentStatus();
189:         if (from == OrderStatus.CREATED) {
190:             order.setCurrentStatus(OrderStatus.CANCELED);
191:             order.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
192:             appendHistory(order, currentUserService.requireCurrentUser(), from, OrderStatus.CANCELED, "ORDER_CANCELED", "Canceled before review");
193:             return toDetail(order);
194:         }
195:         transition(order, OrderStatus.CANCELED, "ORDER_CANCELED", "Canceled before approval");
196:         return toDetail(order);
197:     }
198: 
199:     @Transactional
200:     public OrderDetailResponse review(Long orderId, ReviewOrderRequest request) {
201:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_APPROVE);
202:         UserEntity reviewer = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
203:         ReviewDecision decision = ReviewDecision.valueOf(request.decision().toUpperCase());
204:         if (decision == ReviewDecision.REJECTED) {
205:             throw new ApiException(400, "Rejected orders are not supported in this phase", List.of("Use cancellation from under review if required"));
206:         }
207:         transition(order, OrderStatus.APPROVED, "ORDER_APPROVED", request.comments());
208:         OrderReviewEntity review = orderReviewRepository.findByOrderId(order.getId()).orElseGet(OrderReviewEntity::new);
209:         review.setOrder(order);
210:         review.setReviewer(reviewer);
211:         review.setDecision(decision);
212:         review.setComments(request.comments());
213:         review.setReviewedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
214:         orderReviewRepository.save(review);
215:         order.setApprovedAt(review.getReviewedAt());
216:         order.setReviewCompletedAt(review.getReviewedAt());
217:         auditService.record("ORDER_APPROVED", reviewer.getUsername(), order.getOrderNumber());
218:         return toDetail(order);
219:     }
220: 
221:     @Transactional
222:     public OrderDetailResponse recordPayment(Long orderId, RecordPaymentRequest request) {
223:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_PAYMENT_RECORD);
224:         UserEntity financeUser = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
225:         transition(order, OrderStatus.PAYMENT_RECORDED, "PAYMENT_RECORDED", request.referenceNumber());
226:         OrderPaymentEntity payment = new OrderPaymentEntity();
227:         payment.setOrder(order);
228:         payment.setFinanceUser(financeUser);
229:         payment.setReferenceNumber(request.referenceNumber());
230:         payment.setAmount(request.amount());
231:         payment.setRecordedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
232:         orderPaymentRepository.save(payment);
233:         order.setPaymentRecorded(true);
234:         order.setPaymentRecordedAt(payment.getRecordedAt());
235:         auditService.record("ORDER_PAYMENT_RECORDED", financeUser.getUsername(), order.getOrderNumber());
236:         return toDetail(order);
237:     }
238: 
239:     @Transactional
240:     public OrderDetailResponse pickPack(Long orderId) {
241:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_FULFILL);
242:         transition(order, OrderStatus.PICK_PACK, "PICK_PACK_STARTED", "Pick and pack started");
243:         order.setPickPackStartedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
244:         return toDetail(order);
245:     }
246: 
247:     @Transactional
248:     public OrderDetailResponse createShipment(Long orderId, ShipmentCreateRequest request) {
249:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_FULFILL);
250:         requireStatusIn(order, OrderStatus.PICK_PACK, OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED);
251:         UserEntity actor = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
252:         Map<Long, ProcurementOrderItemEntity> items = order.getItems().stream().collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ProcurementOrderItemEntity::getId, item -> item));
253:         ShipmentEntity shipment = new ShipmentEntity();
254:         shipment.setOrder(order);
255:         shipment.setShipmentNumber(generateNumber("SHP"));
256:         shipment.setFulfillmentUser(actor);
257:         shipment.setStatus("SHIPPED");
258:         shipment.setShippedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
259:         shipment.setNotes(request.notes());
260: 
261:         int shippedNow = 0;
262:         for (QuantityRequest quantityRequest : request.items()) {
263:             ProcurementOrderItemEntity item = requireItem(items, quantityRequest.orderItemId());
264:             int remaining = orderQuantityService.remainingToShip(item.getOrderedQuantity(), item.getShippedQuantity());
265:             if (quantityRequest.quantity() > remaining) {
266:                 throw new ApiException(400, "Cannot ship more than approved quantity", List.of("orderItemId=" + item.getId()));
267:             }
268:             item.setShippedQuantity(item.getShippedQuantity() + quantityRequest.quantity());
269:             ShipmentItemEntity shipmentItem = new ShipmentItemEntity();
270:             shipmentItem.setShipment(shipment);
271:             shipmentItem.setOrderItem(item);
272:             shipmentItem.setQuantity(quantityRequest.quantity());
273:             shipment.getItems().add(shipmentItem);
274:             shippedNow += quantityRequest.quantity();
275:         }
276:         if (shippedNow == 0) {
277:             throw new ApiException(400, "Shipment must include quantities", List.of("No shipment quantities provided"));
278:         }
279:         shipmentRepository.save(shipment);
280:         order.setLastShippedAt(shipment.getShippedAt());
281:         order.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
282:         boolean hasRemainingToShip = order.getItems().stream().anyMatch(item -> orderQuantityService.remainingToShip(item.getOrderedQuantity(), item.getShippedQuantity()) > 0);
283:         if (hasRemainingToShip) {
284:             transition(order, OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED, "SHIPMENT_CREATED", shipment.getShipmentNumber());
285:             auditService.record("ORDER_PARTIALLY_SHIPPED", actor.getUsername(), order.getOrderNumber());
286:         } else {
287:             transition(order, OrderStatus.SHIPPED, "SHIPMENT_CREATED", shipment.getShipmentNumber());
288:             auditService.record("ORDER_SHIPPED", actor.getUsername(), order.getOrderNumber());
289:         }
290:         return toDetail(order);
291:     }

293:     @Transactional
294:     public OrderDetailResponse createReceipt(Long orderId, ReceiptCreateRequest request) {
295:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_RECEIVE);
296:         requireStatusIn(order, OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED, OrderStatus.SHIPPED);
297:         UserEntity buyer = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
298:         Map<Long, ProcurementOrderItemEntity> items = order.getItems().stream().collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ProcurementOrderItemEntity::getId, item -> item));
299:         ReceiptEntity receipt = new ReceiptEntity();
300:         receipt.setOrder(order);
301:         receipt.setReceiptNumber(generateNumber("RCT"));
302:         receipt.setBuyer(buyer);
303:         receipt.setReceivedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
304:         receipt.setNotes(request.notes());
305:         boolean discrepancy = false;
306: 
307:         for (var quantityRequest : request.items()) {
308:             ProcurementOrderItemEntity item = requireItem(items, quantityRequest.orderItemId());
309:             int remainingShipped = orderQuantityService.remainingToReceive(item.getShippedQuantity(), item.getReceivedQuantity());
310:             if (quantityRequest.quantity() > remainingShipped) {
311:                 discrepancy = true;
312:                 if (!request.discrepancyConfirmed()) {
313:                     throw new ApiException(400, "Receipt discrepancy confirmation required", List.of("orderItemId=" + item.getId()));
314:                 }
315:             }
316:             int maxReceivable = item.getOrderedQuantity() - item.getReceivedQuantity();
317:             if (quantityRequest.quantity() > maxReceivable) {
318:                 throw new ApiException(400, "Cannot receive more than ordered quantity", List.of("orderItemId=" + item.getId()));
319:             }
320:             item.setReceivedQuantity(item.getReceivedQuantity() + quantityRequest.quantity());
321:             if (quantityRequest.quantity() != remainingShipped || quantityRequest.quantity() != item.getOrderedQuantity()) {
322:                 item.setDiscrepancyFlag(discrepancy || quantityRequest.discrepancyReason() != null);
323:             }
324:             ReceiptItemEntity receiptItem = new ReceiptItemEntity();
325:             receiptItem.setReceipt(receipt);
326:             receiptItem.setOrderItem(item);
327:             receiptItem.setQuantity(quantityRequest.quantity());
328:             receiptItem.setDiscrepancyReason(quantityRequest.discrepancyReason());
329:             receipt.getItems().add(receiptItem);
330:         }
331:         receipt.setHasDiscrepancy(discrepancy || request.items().stream().anyMatch(item -> item.discrepancyReason() != null && !item.discrepancyReason().isBlank()));
332:         receiptRepository.save(receipt);
333:         order.setLastReceivedAt(receipt.getReceivedAt());
334:         order.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
335:         if (order.getItems().stream().allMatch(item -> item.getReceivedQuantity() >= item.getOrderedQuantity())) {
336:             transition(order, OrderStatus.RECEIVED, "ORDER_RECEIVED", receipt.getReceiptNumber());
337:         } else {
338:             appendHistory(order, buyer, order.getCurrentStatus(), order.getCurrentStatus(), "PARTIAL_RECEIPT_RECORDED", receipt.getReceiptNumber());
339:         }
340:         auditService.record("ORDER_RECEIVED", buyer.getUsername(), order.getOrderNumber());
341:         return toDetail(order);
342:     }

344:     @Transactional
345:     public OrderDetailResponse createReturn(Long orderId, ReturnCreateRequest request) {
346:         ProcurementOrderEntity order = getManagedOrder(orderId, Permission.ORDER_RETURN);
347:         if (order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.RECEIVED && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.SHIPPED && order.getCurrentStatus() != OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_SHIPPED) {
348:             throw new ApiException(400, "Returns require a shipped or received order", List.of(order.getCurrentStatus().name()));
349:         }
350:         UserEntity buyer = currentUserService.requireCurrentUser();
351:         Map<Long, ProcurementOrderItemEntity> items = order.getItems().stream().collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ProcurementOrderItemEntity::getId, item -> item));
352:         OrderReturnEntity orderReturn = new OrderReturnEntity();
353:         orderReturn.setOrder(order);
354:         orderReturn.setReturnNumber(generateNumber("RTN"));
355:         orderReturn.setBuyer(buyer);
356:         orderReturn.setReasonCode(request.reasonCode());
357:         orderReturn.setComments(request.comments());
358:         orderReturn.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
359:         for (QuantityRequest quantityRequest : request.items()) {
360:             ProcurementOrderItemEntity item = requireItem(items, quantityRequest.orderItemId());
361:             int returnable = item.getReceivedQuantity() - item.getReturnedQuantity();
362:             if (quantityRequest.quantity() > returnable) {
363:                 throw new ApiException(400, "Cannot return more than received quantity", List.of("orderItemId=" + item.getId()));
364:             }
365:             item.setReturnedQuantity(item.getReturnedQuantity() + quantityRequest.quantity());
366:             ReturnItemEntity returnItem = new ReturnItemEntity();
367:             returnItem.setOrderReturn(orderReturn);
368:             returnItem.setOrderItem(item);
369:             returnItem.setQuantity(quantityRequest.quantity());
370:             orderReturn.getItems().add(returnItem);
371:         }
372:         orderReturnRepository.save(orderReturn);
373:         order.setReturnedAt(orderReturn.getCreatedAt());
374:         transition(order, OrderStatus.RETURNED, "RETURN_CREATED", orderReturn.getReturnNumber());
375:         return toDetail(order);
376:     }

391:                 .orElseThrow(() -> new ApiException(404, "Order item not found", List.of("orderItemId=" + request.orderItemId())));

416:     private void requireStatus(ProcurementOrderEntity order, OrderStatus expected) {
417:         if (order.getCurrentStatus() != expected) {
418:             throw new ApiException(400, "Order is not in the expected status", List.of("expected=" + expected.name(), "actual=" + order.getCurrentStatus().name()));
419:         }

422:     private void requireStatusIn(ProcurementOrderEntity order, OrderStatus... expectedStatuses) {
423:         for (OrderStatus expectedStatus : expectedStatuses) {
424:             if (order.getCurrentStatus() == expectedStatus) {
425:                 return;
426:             }
427:         }
428:         String expected = java.util.Arrays.stream(expectedStatuses).map(OrderStatus::name).collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.joining(","));
429:         throw new ApiException(400, "Order is not in the expected status", List.of("expected=" + expected, "actual=" + order.getCurrentStatus().name()));
430:     }

432:     private void transition(ProcurementOrderEntity order, OrderStatus target, String eventType, String detail) {
433:         if (order.getCurrentStatus() == OrderStatus.APPROVED && target == OrderStatus.CANCELED) {
434:             throw new ApiException(400, "Approved orders cannot be canceled directly", List.of("Dual approval required in later phase"));
435:         }
436:         if (order.getCurrentStatus() != target) {
437:             stateMachineService.validateTransition(order.getCurrentStatus(), target);
438:             OrderStatus from = order.getCurrentStatus();
439:             order.setCurrentStatus(target);
440:             order.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
441:             appendHistory(order, currentUserService.requireCurrentUser(), from, target, eventType, detail);
442:         } else {
443:             appendHistory(order, currentUserService.requireCurrentUser(), target, target, eventType, detail);
444:         }
445:     }

447:     private void appendHistory(ProcurementOrderEntity order, UserEntity actor, OrderStatus from, OrderStatus to, String eventType, String detail) {
448:         OrderStatusHistoryEntity history = new OrderStatusHistoryEntity();
449:         history.setOrder(order);
450:         history.setActorUser(actor);
451:         history.setFromStatus(from == null ? null : from.name());
452:         history.setToStatus(to.name());
453:         history.setEventType(eventType);
454:         history.setDetail(detail);
455:         history.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
456:         orderStatusHistoryRepository.save(history);
457:     }

97:         CheckInEntity checkIn = new CheckInEntity();
98:         checkIn.setOwnerUser(actor);
99:         checkIn.setCommentText(request.commentText());
100:         checkIn.setDeviceTimestamp(request.deviceTimestamp());
101:         checkIn.setServerReceivedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
102:         checkIn.setLatitude(request.latitude());

104:         checkIn.setCurrentRevisionNumber(1);

109:         CheckInRevisionEntity revision = createRevision(checkIn, actor, request.commentText(), request.deviceTimestamp(), request.latitude(), request.longitude(), List.of("commentText", "deviceTimestamp", "latitude", "longitude"));
110:         saveAttachments(checkIn, revision, files);
111:         checkInAuditService.record(checkIn, revision, actor, CheckInAuditAction.CREATED, "Initial check-in created");

120:         if (changedFields.isEmpty() && (files == null || files.length == 0 || Arrays.stream(files).allMatch(MultipartFile::isEmpty))) {
121:             throw new ApiException(400, "No changes detected", List.of("NO_REVISION_CREATED"));
122:         }

124:         checkIn.setCommentText(request.commentText());
125:         checkIn.setDeviceTimestamp(request.deviceTimestamp());
126:         checkIn.setLatitude(request.latitude());
127:         checkIn.setLongitude(request.longitude());
128:         checkIn.setCurrentRevisionNumber(checkIn.getCurrentRevisionNumber() + 1);
129:         checkIn.setUpdatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
130:         CheckInRevisionEntity revision = createRevision(checkIn, actor, request.commentText(), request.deviceTimestamp(), request.latitude(), request.longitude(), changedFields);
131:         saveAttachments(checkIn, revision, files);

133:         return get(checkInId);

167:         Path path = documentStorageService.resolve(attachment.getStoragePath());

179:             actor,

181:             checkIn.getOwnerUser().getId(),
182:             checkIn.getOwnerUser().getRole().getName(),
183:             checkIn.getOwnerUser().getOrganizationCode()
184:         );
185:         if (!allowed) {
186:             throw new ApiException(403, "Access denied", List.of("CHECKIN_SCOPE_RESTRICTION", "permission=" + permission.name()));
187:         }
188:         return checkIn;
189:     }

191:     private CheckInRevisionEntity createRevision(CheckInEntity checkIn, UserEntity actor, String commentText, OffsetDateTime deviceTimestamp, java.math.BigDecimal latitude, java.math.BigDecimal longitude, List<String> changedFields) {
192:         CheckInRevisionEntity revision = new CheckInRevisionEntity();
193:         revision.setCheckIn(checkIn);
194:         revision.setRevisionNumber(checkIn.getCurrentRevisionNumber());
195:         revision.setCommentText(commentText);
196:         revision.setDeviceTimestamp(deviceTimestamp);
197:         revision.setLatitude(latitude);
198:         revision.setLongitude(longitude);
199:         revision.setChangedFields(String.join(",", changedFields));
200:         revision.setEditedBy(actor);
201:         revision.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
202:         return checkInRevisionRepository.save(revision);
203:     }
204: 
205:     private void saveAttachments(CheckInEntity checkIn, CheckInRevisionEntity revision, MultipartFile[] files) {
206:         if (files == null) {
207:             return;
208:         }
209:         for (MultipartFile file : files) {
210:             if (file == null || file.isEmpty()) {
211:                 continue;
212:             }
213:             documentFileValidationService.validate(file);
214:             DocumentStorageService.StoredFileMetadata stored = documentStorageService.store("CHECKIN", "CHK-" + checkIn.getId(), revision.getRevisionNumber(), file);
215:             CheckInAttachmentEntity attachment = new CheckInAttachmentEntity();
216:             attachment.setCheckIn(checkIn);
217:             attachment.setRevision(revision);
218:             attachment.setOriginalFileName(stored.originalFileName());
219:             attachment.setStoredFileName(stored.storedFileName());
220:             attachment.setStoragePath(stored.storagePath());
221:             attachment.setMimeType(stored.mimeType());
222:             attachment.setFileSizeBytes(stored.fileSizeBytes());
223:             attachment.setSha256Hash(documentHashingService.sha256(stored.absolutePath()));
224:             attachment.setSignatureValue(documentSignatureService.sign(attachment.getSha256Hash()));
225:             attachment.setSignatureAlgorithm(documentSignatureService.algorithm());
226:             attachment.setSignerKeyId(documentSignatureService.keyId());
227:             attachment.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
228:             checkInAttachmentRepository.save(attachment);
229:         }

233:         int revisionCount = checkInRevisionRepository.findByCheckInIdOrderByRevisionNumberDesc(checkIn.getId()).size();
234:         int attachmentCount = checkInAttachmentRepository.findByCheckInIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(checkIn.getId()).size();

261:     @Transactional
262:     public DocumentDetailResponse archive(Long documentId) {
263:         DocumentEntity document = requireDocument(documentId, Permission.DOCUMENT_ARCHIVE);
264:         if (document.getStatus() != DocumentStatus.APPROVED) {
265:             throw new ApiException(400, "Only approved documents can be archived", List.of(document.getStatus().name()));
266:         }
267:         DocumentVersionEntity version = document.getCurrentVersion();
268:         if (version.getStoragePath() == null) {
269:             throw new ApiException(400, "Archived documents require a stored file", List.of("NO_FILE_ATTACHED"));

328:     @Transactional
329:     public ResponseEntity<Resource> download(Long documentId, boolean download) {
330:         Permission permission = download ? Permission.DOCUMENT_DOWNLOAD : Permission.DOCUMENT_VIEW;
331:         DocumentEntity document = requireDocument(documentId, permission);
332:         if (document.getStatus() == DocumentStatus.DESTROYED) {
333:             throw new ApiException(400, "Destroyed documents cannot be downloaded", List.of("DOCUMENT_DESTROYED"));
334:         }
335:         DocumentVersionEntity version = document.getCurrentVersion();
336:         if (version.getStoragePath() == null) {
337:             throw new ApiException(404, "Document file not found", List.of("NO_FILE"));
338:         }
339:         Path path = documentStorageService.resolve(version.getStoragePath());
340:         documentAuditService.record(document, version, currentUserService.requireCurrentUser(), DocumentAuditAction.DOWNLOADED, version.getOriginalFileName());
341:         FileSystemResource resource = new FileSystemResource(path);
342:         HttpHeaders headers = new HttpHeaders();
343:         if (download) {
344:             headers.add(HttpHeaders.CONTENT_DISPOSITION, "attachment; filename=\"" + version.getOriginalFileName() + "\"");
345:         }
346:         return ResponseEntity.ok().headers(headers).contentType(version.getMimeType() == null ? MediaType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM : MediaType.parseMediaType(version.getMimeType())).body(resource);
347:     }

349:     private DocumentVersionEntity createVersion(DocumentEntity document, UserEntity actor, String title, String contentText, MultipartFile file, int versionNumber) {
350:         DocumentVersionEntity version = new DocumentVersionEntity();
351:         version.setDocument(document);
352:         version.setVersionNumber(versionNumber);
353:         version.setTitleSnapshot(title);
354:         version.setContentText(contentText);
355:         version.setCreatedBy(actor);
356:         version.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
357:         if (file != null && !file.isEmpty()) {
358:             documentFileValidationService.validate(file);
359:             String documentNumber = document.getDocumentNumber() == null ? "DRAFT-" + document.getId() : document.getDocumentNumber();
360:             DocumentStorageService.StoredFileMetadata stored = documentStorageService.store(document.getDocumentType().getCode(), documentNumber, versionNumber, file);
361:             version.setOriginalFileName(stored.originalFileName());
362:             version.setStoredFileName(stored.storedFileName());
363:             version.setStoragePath(stored.storagePath());
364:             version.setMimeType(stored.mimeType());
365:             version.setFileSizeBytes(stored.fileSizeBytes());
366:             version.setSha256Hash(documentHashingService.sha256(stored.absolutePath()));
367:         }
368:         return documentVersionRepository.save(version);
369:     }

371:     private void createApprovalRoute(DocumentEntity document, DocumentVersionEntity version, List<String> approvalRoles) {
372:         DocumentApprovalRouteEntity route = new DocumentApprovalRouteEntity();
373:         route.setDocument(document);
374:         route.setVersion(version);
375:         route.setStatus(DocumentApprovalStatus.PENDING);
376:         route.setCreatedAt(OffsetDateTime.now());
377:         route = documentApprovalRouteRepository.save(route);
378:         int order = 1;
379:         for (String approvalRole : approvalRoles) {
380:             DocumentApprovalStepEntity step = new DocumentApprovalStepEntity();
381:             step.setRoute(route);
382:             step.setStepOrder(order++);
383:             step.setApproverRole(normalizeApprovalRole(approvalRole));
384:             step.setStatus(DocumentApprovalStatus.PENDING);
385:             route.getSteps().add(step);
386:         }
387:         documentApprovalRouteRepository.save(route);
388:     }

396:         } catch (IllegalArgumentException ex) {
397:             throw new ApiException(400, "Invalid approval role", List.of("approvalRole=" + approvalRole));
398:         }
399:     }

79:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.ORDER_EXCEPTION_CREATE, DataScope.GLOBAL),
80:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.DOCUMENT_VIEW, DataScope.GLOBAL),
81:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.DOCUMENT_CREATE, DataScope.GLOBAL),
82:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.DOCUMENT_EDIT, DataScope.GLOBAL),

94:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.ADMIN_CONFIG_VIEW, DataScope.GLOBAL),
95:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.REASON_CODE_MANAGE, DataScope.GLOBAL),
96:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.APPROVAL_REVIEW, DataScope.GLOBAL),
97:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.ADMIN_ACCESS, DataScope.GLOBAL),
98:             new PermissionGrant(Permission.USER_VIEW_SELF, DataScope.GLOBAL)
99:         ));
100:     }
101: 
102:     private void registerRole(RoleName roleName, List<PermissionGrant> grants) {
103:         Set<Permission> seen = new HashSet<>();
104:         Map<Permission, DataScope> scopes = new EnumMap<>(Permission.class);
105:         for (PermissionGrant grant : grants) {
106:             if (!seen.add(grant.permission())) {
107:                 throw new IllegalStateException("Duplicate permission mapping for role " + roleName + ": " + grant.permission().name());
108:             }
109:             scopes.put(grant.permission(), grant.dataScope());
110:         }
111:         permissionMap.put(roleName, List.copyOf(grants));
112:         permissionScopeMap.put(roleName, Map.copyOf(scopes));
113:     }
114: 
115:     public List<PermissionGrant> getGrants(RoleName roleName) {
116:         return permissionMap.getOrDefault(roleName, List.of());
117:     }
118: 
119:     public Optional<DataScope> getDataScope(RoleName roleName, Permission permission) {
120:         return Optional.ofNullable(permissionScopeMap.getOrDefault(roleName, Map.of()).get(permission));
121:     }
122: 
123:     public Set<Permission> getPermissions(RoleName roleName) {
124:         Set<Permission> permissions = EnumSet.noneOf(Permission.class);
125:         getGrants(roleName).forEach(grant -> permissions.add(grant.permission()));
126:         return permissions;
127:     }
128: }

import { Routes } from '@angular/router';
import { authGuard } from './core/guards/auth.guard';
import { roleGuard } from './core/guards/role.guard';
import { ShellComponent } from './layout/shell/shell.component';

export const routes: Routes = [
  { path: 'login', loadComponent: () => import('./features/auth/login/login.component').then((m) => m.LoginComponent) },
  { path: 'unauthorized', loadComponent: () => import('./features/auth/unauthorized/unauthorized.component').then((m) => m.UnauthorizedComponent) },
  {
    path: '',
    component: ShellComponent,
    canActivate: [authGuard],
    children: [
      { path: '', pathMatch: 'full', redirectTo: 'dashboard' },
      { path: 'dashboard', loadComponent: () => import('./features/dashboard/dashboard.component').then((m) => m.DashboardComponent) },

      { path: 'orders/review', loadComponent: () => import('./features/orders/review/review-orders.component').then((m) => m.ReviewOrdersComponent), canActivate: [roleGuard], data: { roles: ['QUALITY_REVIEWER', 'SYSTEM_ADMINISTRATOR'] } },

14: @Component({
15:   selector: 'app-check-ins-page',
16:   standalone: true,
17:   imports: [CommonModule, DatePipe, ReactiveFormsModule, MatCardModule, MatButtonModule, MatFormFieldModule, MatInputModule],
18:   templateUrl: './check-ins-page.component.html',
19:   styleUrl: './check-ins-page.component.scss'
20: })
21: export class CheckInsPageComponent implements OnInit {
22:   checkIns: CheckInSummaryModel[] = [];
23:   selectedCheckIn: CheckInDetailModel | null = null;
24:   selectedFiles: File[] = [];
25:   isLocating = false;
26:   loadError = '';
27:   isCreating = false;
28:   isUpdating = false;
29: 
30:   readonly form = this.fb.group({
31:     commentText: [''],
32:     deviceTimestamp: [new Date().toISOString()],
33:     latitude: [null as number | null],
34:     longitude: [null as number | null]
35:   });
36: 
37:   constructor(
38:     private readonly fb: FormBuilder,
39:     private readonly checkInService: CheckInService,
40:     private readonly snackBar: MatSnackBar
41:   ) {}
42: 
43:   ngOnInit(): void {
44:     this.reload();
45:   }
46: 
47:   quickCreate(): void {
48:     if (this.isCreating) {
49:       return;
50:     }
51:     this.form.patchValue({ deviceTimestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
52:     this.isCreating = true;
53:     this.checkInService.create(JSON.stringify(this.form.getRawValue()), this.selectedFiles).pipe(
54:       finalize(() => (this.isCreating = false))
55:     ).subscribe({
56:       next: (checkIn) => {
57:         this.selectedCheckIn = checkIn;
58:         this.selectedFiles = [];
59:         this.snackBar.open('Check-in created', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2000 });
60:         this.reload();
61:       }
62:     });
63:   }
64: 
65:   update(): void {
66:     if (!this.selectedCheckIn || this.isUpdating) {
67:       return;
68:     }
69:     this.form.patchValue({ deviceTimestamp: new Date().toISOString() });
70:     this.isUpdating = true;
71:     this.checkInService.update(this.selectedCheckIn.id, JSON.stringify(this.form.getRawValue()), this.selectedFiles).pipe(
72:       finalize(() => (this.isUpdating = false))
73:     ).subscribe({
74:       next: (checkIn) => {
75:         this.selectedCheckIn = checkIn;
76:         this.selectedFiles = [];
77:         this.snackBar.open('Check-in updated with new revision', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
78:         this.reload();
79:       }
80:     });
81:   }
82: 
83:   captureGeolocation(): void {
84:     if (!navigator.geolocation) {
85:       this.snackBar.open('Geolocation is unavailable in this browser.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
86:       return;
87:     }
88:     this.isLocating = true;
89:     navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
90:       (position) => {
91:         this.form.patchValue({ latitude: position.coords.latitude, longitude: position.coords.longitude });
92:         this.isLocating = false;
93:       },
94:       () => {
95:         this.isLocating = false;
96:         this.snackBar.open('Geolocation permission was denied or unavailable.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
97:       }
98:     );
99:   }
100: 
101:   selectCheckIn(id: number): void {
102:     this.checkInService.get(id).subscribe({
103:       next: (checkIn) => {
104:         this.selectedCheckIn = checkIn;
105:         this.form.patchValue({
106:           commentText: checkIn.commentText ?? '',
107:           deviceTimestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
108:           latitude: checkIn.latitude ?? null,
109:           longitude: checkIn.longitude ?? null
110:         });
111:       }
112:     });
113:   }
114: 
115:   onFilesSelected(event: Event): void {
116:     const input = event.target as HTMLInputElement;
117:     this.selectedFiles = Array.from(input.files ?? []);
118:   }
119: 
120:   highlightClass(revision: CheckInRevisionModel, field: string): string {
121:     return revision.changedFields.includes(field) ? 'changed' : '';
122:   }
123: 
124:   attachmentUrl(attachmentId: number): string {
125:     if (!this.selectedCheckIn) {
126:       return '';
127:     }
128:     return this.checkInService.attachmentUrl(this.selectedCheckIn.id, attachmentId);
129:   }
130: 
131:   private reload(): void {
132:     this.loadError = '';
133:     this.checkInService.list().pipe(
134:       catchError(() => {
135:         this.loadError = 'Field check-ins could not be loaded right now.';
136:         return of({ content: [] as CheckInSummaryModel[], totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, number: 0, size: 20, first: true, last: true });
137:       })
138:     ).subscribe({ next: (page) => (this.checkIns = page.content) });
139:   }
140: }

<content>1: package com.pharmaprocure.portal.integration;
2: 
3: import static org.springframework.http.MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON;
4: import static org.springframework.security.test.web.servlet.request.SecurityMockMvcRequestPostProcessors.csrf;
5: import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.post;
6: import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.jsonPath;
7: import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.status;
8: 
9: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.entity.CriticalActionRequestEntity;
10: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionRequestType;
11: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionStatus;
12: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.CriticalActionTargetType;
13: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.OrderStatus;
14: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.enums.RoleName;
15: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.repository.CriticalActionRequestRepository;
16: import java.time.OffsetDateTime;
17: import java.util.Map;
18: import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
19: import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
20: 
21: class IdempotencyIntegrationTest extends AbstractMockMvcIntegrationTest {
22: 
23:     @Autowired
24:     private CriticalActionRequestRepository criticalActionRequestRepository;
25: 
26:     @Test
27:     void doubleSubmitForReviewDoesNotCorruptState() throws Exception {
28:         var buyer = createUser(RoleName.BUYER, "buyer-idem-submit", "ORG-ALPHA", "Password!23");
29:         var order = createOrder(buyer, OrderStatus.CREATED, 10, 0, 0);
30: 
31:         mockMvc.perform(post("/api/orders/{orderId}/submit-review", order.getId())
32:                 .with(authenticated(buyer))
33:                 .with(csrf())
34:                 .contentType(APPLICATION_JSON))
35:             .andExpect(status().isOk())
36:             .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("UNDER_REVIEW"));
37: 
38:         // Second submit — the transition method treats same-status transitions as no-ops
39:         // The order stays in UNDER_REVIEW without error
40:         mockMvc.perform(post("/api/orders/{orderId}/submit-review", order.getId())
41:                 .with(authenticated(buyer))
42:                 .with(csrf())
43:                 .contentType(APPLICATION_JSON))
44:             .andExpect(status().isOk())
45:             .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("UNDER_REVIEW"));
46:     }
47: 
48:     @Test
49:     void doubleApproveOrderDoesNotCorruptState() throws Exception {
50:         var buyer = createUser(RoleName.BUYER, "buyer-idem-approve", "ORG-ALPHA", "Password!23");
51:         var quality = createUser(RoleName.QUALITY_REVIEWER, "quality-idem-approve", "ORG-ALPHA", "Password!23");
52:         var order = createOrder(buyer, OrderStatus.UNDER_REVIEW, 10, 0, 0);
53: 
54:         String approveBody = json(Map.of("decision", "APPROVED", "comments", "Looks good"));
55: 
56:         mockMvc.perform(post("/api/orders/{orderId}/approve", order.getId())
57:                 .with(authenticated(quality))
58:                 .with(csrf())
59:                 .contentType(APPLICATION_JSON)
60:                 .content(approveBody))
61:             .andExpect(status().isOk())
62:             .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("APPROVED"));
63: 
64:         // Second approval — same-status transition, treated as no-op
65:         mockMvc.perform(post("/api/orders/{orderId}/approve", order.getId())
66:                 .with(authenticated(quality))
67:                 .with(csrf())
68:                 .contentType(APPLICATION_JSON)
69:                 .content(approveBody))
70:             .andExpect(status().isOk())
71:             .andExpect(jsonPath("$.status").value("APPROVED"));
72:     }
73: 
74:     @Test
75:     void doubleCriticalActionDecisionBySameUserReturns400() throws Exception {
76:         var buyer = createUser(RoleName.BUYER, "buyer-idem-critical", "ORG-ALPHA", "Password!23");
77:         var quality = createUser(RoleName.QUALITY_REVIEWER, "quality-idem-critical", "ORG-ALPHA", "Password!23");
78:         var order = createOrder(buyer, OrderStatus.APPROVED, 5, 0, 0);
79: 
80:         CriticalActionRequestEntity request = new CriticalActionRequestEntity();
81:         request.setRequestType(CriticalActionRequestType.ORDER_CANCELLATION_AFTER_APPROVAL);
82:         request.setTargetType(CriticalActionTargetType.ORDER);
83:         request.setTargetId(order.getId());
84:         request.setJustification("Idempotency test");
85:         request.setRequestedBy(buyer);
86:         request.setStatus(CriticalActionStatus.PENDING);

13: @Component({

17:   templateUrl: './receipts.component.html',

20: export class ReceiptsComponent implements OnInit {
21:   orders: OrderSummaryModel[] = [];
22:   selectedOrder: OrderDetailModel | null = null;
23:   readonly receiptForm = this.fb.group({ notes: [''], items: this.fb.array<FormGroup>([]) });
24: 
25:   constructor(private readonly fb: FormBuilder, private readonly orderService: OrderService, private readonly dialog: MatDialog) {}
26: 
27:   ngOnInit(): void {
28:     this.refresh();
29:   }
30: 
31:   load(orderId: number): void {
32:     this.orderService.getOrder(orderId).subscribe({
33:       next: (order) => {
34:         this.selectedOrder = order;
35:         this.resetReceiptItems(order);
36:       }
37:     });
38:   }
39: 
40:   receivePartial(discrepancy = false): void {
41:     if (!this.selectedOrder) {
42:       return;
43:     }
44:     const items = this.receiptItemControls
45:       .map((group) => ({
46:         orderItemId: group.controls['orderItemId'].value,
47:         quantity: Number(group.controls['quantity'].value),
48:         discrepancyReason: group.controls['discrepancyReason'].value
49:       }))
50:       .filter((item) => item.quantity > 0)
51:       .map((item) => ({ ...item, discrepancyReason: item.discrepancyReason || undefined }));
52:     if (items.length === 0) {
53:       this.receiptItems.markAllAsTouched();
54:       return;
55:     }
56: 
57:     const submit = () => this.orderService.createReceipt(this.selectedOrder!.id, {
58:       items,
59:       notes: this.receiptForm.value.notes,
60:       discrepancyConfirmed: discrepancy
61:     }).subscribe({
62:       next: (order) => {
63:         this.selectedOrder = order;
64:         this.resetReceiptItems(order);
65:       }
66:     });
67: 
68:     if (discrepancy) {
69:       this.dialog.open(DiscrepancyDialogComponent).afterClosed().subscribe((confirmed) => confirmed && submit());
70:       return;
71:     }
72:     submit();
73:   }
74: 
75:   get receiptItems(): FormArray<FormGroup> {
76:     return this.receiptForm.controls['items'] as FormArray<FormGroup>;
77:   }
78:

80:     return this.receiptItems.controls as FormGroup[];
81:   }
82:

84:     const next = order.items
85:       .filter((item) => item.remainingToReceive > 0)
86:       .map((item) =>
87:         this.fb.group({
88:           orderItemId: this.fb.nonNullable.control(item.id),
89:           sku: this.fb.nonNullable.control(item.sku),
90:           remainingToReceive: this.fb.nonNullable.control(item.remainingToReceive),
91:           quantity: this.fb.nonNullable.control(0, [Validators.required, Validators.min(0), Validators.max(item.remainingToReceive)]),
92:           discrepancyReason: this.fb.nonNullable.control('')
93:         })
94:       );
95:     this.receiptForm.setControl('items', this.fb.array(next));
96:   }
97: 
98:   private refresh(): void {
99:     this.orderService.listOrders().subscribe({ next: (page) => (this.orders = page.content.filter((order) => ['PARTIALLY_SHIPPED', 'SHIPPED'].includes(order.status))) });
100:   }

<content>1: package com.pharmaprocure.portal.security;
2: 
3: import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
4: import com.pharmaprocure.portal.dto.ApiErrorResponse;
5: import jakarta.servlet.FilterChain;
6: import jakarta.servlet.ServletException;
7: import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
8: import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
9: import java.io.IOException;
10: import java.time.Clock;
11: import java.time.Instant;
12: import java.util.ArrayDeque;
13: import java.util.Deque;
14: import java.util.List;
15: import java.util.Map;
16: import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;
17: import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
18: import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
19: import org.springframework.security.authentication.AnonymousAuthenticationToken;
20: import org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;
21: import org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder;
22: import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;
23: import org.springframework.web.filter.OncePerRequestFilter;
24: 
25: @Component
26: public class RateLimitFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {
27: 
28:     private final int maxRequestsPerMinute;
29:     private final int maxLoginRequestsPerMinute;
30:     private final Map<String, Deque<Instant>> requestWindows = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
31:     private final Map<String, Deque<Instant>> loginIpWindows = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
32:     private final Map<String, Deque<Instant>> authIpWindows = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
33:     private final Clock clock;
34:     private final ObjectMapper objectMapper;
35: 
36:     @Autowired
37:     public RateLimitFilter(
38:             ObjectMapper objectMapper,
39:             @org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value("${rate.limit.max-per-minute:60}") int maxRequestsPerMinute,
40:             @org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value("${rate.limit.login.max-per-minute:100}") int maxLoginRequestsPerMinute) {
41:         this(objectMapper, Clock.systemUTC(), maxRequestsPerMinute, maxLoginRequestsPerMinute);
42:     }
43: 
44:     RateLimitFilter(ObjectMapper objectMapper, Clock clock, int maxRequestsPerMinute, int maxLoginRequestsPerMinute) {
45:         this.objectMapper = objectMapper;
46:         this.clock = clock;
47:         this.maxRequestsPerMinute = maxRequestsPerMinute;
48:         this.maxLoginRequestsPerMinute = maxLoginRequestsPerMinute;
49:     }
50: 
51:     @Override
52:     protected boolean shouldNotFilter(HttpServletRequest request) {
53:         String path = request.getRequestURI();
54:         return path.startsWith("/api/health") || path.startsWith("/api/meta") || path.startsWith("/actuator");
55:     }
56: 
57:     @Override
58:     protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain) throws ServletException, IOException {
59:         String path = request.getRequestURI();
60: 
61:         if (path.startsWith("/api/auth/login")) {
62:             String clientIp = resolveClientIp(request);
63:             if (isRateLimited(loginIpWindows, clientIp, maxLoginRequestsPerMinute)) {
64:                 writeRateLimitResponse(response, "MAX_" + maxLoginRequestsPerMinute + "_LOGIN_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE");
65:                 return;
66:             }
67:             filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
68:             return;
69:         }
70: 
71:         if (path.startsWith("/api/auth/")) {
72:             String clientIp = resolveClientIp(request);
73:             if (isRateLimited(authIpWindows, clientIp, maxRequestsPerMinute)) {
74:                 writeRateLimitResponse(response, "MAX_" + maxRequestsPerMinute + "_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE");
75:                 return;
76:             }
77:             filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
78:             return;
79:         }
80: 
81:         Authentication authentication = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();
82:         if (authentication == null || !authentication.isAuthenticated() || authentication instanceof AnonymousAuthenticationToken) {
83:             filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
84:             return;
85:         }
86: 
87:         String key = authentication.getName();
88:         if (isRateLimited(requestWindows, key, maxRequestsPerMinute)) {
89:             writeRateLimitResponse(response, "MAX_" + maxRequestsPerMinute + "_REQUESTS_PER_MINUTE");
90:             return;
91:         }
92: 
93:         filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
94:     }
95: 
96:     private boolean isRateLimited(Map<String, Deque<Instant>> windows, String key, int maxRequests) {
97:         Deque<Instant> window = windows.computeIfAbsent(key, ignored -> new ArrayDeque<>());
98:         Instant now = clock.instant();
99:         synchronized (window) {
100:             while (!window.isEmpty() && window.peekFirst().isBefore(now.minusSeconds(60))) {
101:                 window.pollFirst();
102:             }
103:             if (window.size() >= maxRequests) {
104:                 return true;
105:             }
106:             window.addLast(now);
107:         }
108:         return false;
109:     }
110: 
111:     private void writeRateLimitResponse(HttpServletResponse response, String detail) throws IOException {
112:         response.setStatus(429);
113:         response.setContentType(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE);
114:         objectMapper.writeValue(response.getOutputStream(), new ApiErrorResponse(429, "Rate limit exceeded", List.of(detail)));
115:     }
116: 
117:     private String resolveClientIp(HttpServletRequest request) {
118:         String forwarded = request.getHeader("X-Forwarded-For");
119:         if (forwarded != null && !forwarded.isBlank()) {
120:             return forwarded.split(",")[0].trim();
121:         }
122:         return request.getRemoteAddr();
123:     }

47:       error: () => this.snackBar.open('Request details could not be loaded.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2600 })
48:     });
49:   }
50: 
51:   approve(id: number): void {
52:     if (!this.canDecide || this.isDecisionSubmitting) {
53:       return;
54:     }
55:     this.isDecisionSubmitting = true;
56:     this.criticalActionService.decide(id, { decision: 'APPROVE', comments: this.form.value.comments }).subscribe({
57:       next: (request) => {
58:         this.selectedRequest = request;
59:         this.snackBar.open('Critical action approval recorded', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
60:         this.reload();
61:       },
62:       error: () => this.snackBar.open('Approval failed. Please retry.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2600 })
63:     }).add(() => {
64:       this.isDecisionSubmitting = false;
65:     });
66:   }
67: 
68:   reject(id: number): void {
69:     if (!this.canDecide || this.isDecisionSubmitting) {
70:       return;
71:     }
72:     this.isDecisionSubmitting = true;
73:     this.criticalActionService.decide(id, { decision: 'REJECT', comments: 'Rejected in approval queue.' }).subscribe({
74:       next: (request) => {
75:         this.selectedRequest = request;
76:         this.snackBar.open('Critical action rejected', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
77:         this.reload();
78:       },
79:       error: () => this.snackBar.open('Rejection failed. Please retry.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2600 })
80:     }).add(() => {
81:       this.isDecisionSubmitting = false;
82:     });
83:   }
84: 
85:   private reload(): void {
86:     this.loadError = '';
87:     this.criticalActionService.list().pipe(
88:       catchError(() => {
89:         this.requests = [];
90:         this.selectedRequest = null;
91:         this.loadError = 'Critical action queue could not be loaded right now.';
92:         return of({ content: [] as CriticalActionRequestModel[], totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, number: 0, size: 20, first: true, last: true });
93:       })
94:     ).subscribe({ next: (page) => (this.requests = page.content) });
95:   }
96: }

<content>1: import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
2: import { HttpClient, HttpContext, HttpParams } from '@angular/common/http';
3: import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
4: import {
5:   DocumentArchiveModel,
6:   DocumentDetailModel,
7:   DocumentPreviewModel,
8:   DocumentSummaryModel,
9:   DocumentTemplateModel,
10:   DocumentTypeModel
11: } from '../models/document.models';
12: import { PageResponse, PageParams } from '../models/page.model';
13: import { SKIP_ERROR_TOAST } from '../interceptors/http-context.tokens';
14: import { environment } from '../../../environments/environment';
15: 
16: @Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
17: export class DocumentCenterService {
18:   private readonly silentContext = new HttpContext().set(SKIP_ERROR_TOAST, true);
19:   private readonly apiBaseUrl = environment.apiBaseUrl.endsWith('/') ? environment.apiBaseUrl.slice(0, -1) : environment.apiBaseUrl;
20: 
21:   constructor(private readonly http: HttpClient) {}
22: 
23:   listTypes(): Observable<DocumentTypeModel[]> {
24:     return this.http.get<DocumentTypeModel[]>('/documents/types', { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true });
25:   }
26: 
27:   listTemplates(): Observable<DocumentTemplateModel[]> {
28:     return this.http.get<DocumentTemplateModel[]>('/documents/templates', { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true });
29:   }
30: 
31:   createTemplate(payload: unknown): Observable<DocumentTemplateModel> {
32:     return this.http.post<DocumentTemplateModel>('/documents/templates', payload, { withCredentials: true });
33:   }
34: 
35:   listDocuments(params?: PageParams & { status?: string; documentTypeId?: number }): Observable<PageResponse<DocumentSummaryModel>> {
36:     let httpParams = new HttpParams();
37:     if (params?.page != null) httpParams = httpParams.set('page', params.page);
38:     if (params?.size != null) httpParams = httpParams.set('size', params.size);
39:     if (params?.sort) httpParams = httpParams.set('sort', params.sort);
40:     if (params?.status) httpParams = httpParams.set('status', params.status);
41:     if (params?.documentTypeId != null) httpParams = httpParams.set('documentTypeId', params.documentTypeId);
42:     return this.http.get<PageResponse<DocumentSummaryModel>>('/documents', { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true, params: httpParams });
43:   }
44: 
45:   approvalQueue(params?: PageParams): Observable<PageResponse<DocumentSummaryModel>> {
46:     let httpParams = new HttpParams();
47:     if (params?.page != null) httpParams = httpParams.set('page', params.page);
48:     if (params?.size != null) httpParams = httpParams.set('size', params.size);
49:     if (params?.sort) httpParams = httpParams.set('sort', params.sort);
50:     return this.http.get<PageResponse<DocumentSummaryModel>>('/documents/approval-queue', { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true, params: httpParams });
51:   }
52: 
53:   archiveList(): Observable<DocumentArchiveModel[]> {
54:     return this.http.get<DocumentArchiveModel[]>('/documents/archive', { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true });
55:   }
56: 
57:   getDocument(id: number): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
58:     return this.http.get<DocumentDetailModel>(`/documents/${id}`, { context: this.silentContext, withCredentials: true });
59:   }
60: 
61:   createDraft(payload: string, file?: File | null): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
62:     const formData = new FormData();
63:     formData.append('payload', payload);
64:     if (file) {
65:       formData.append('file', file);
66:     }
67:     return this.http.post<DocumentDetailModel>('/documents', formData, { withCredentials: true });
68:   }
69: 
70:   updateDraft(id: number, payload: string, file?: File | null): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
71:     const formData = new FormData();
72:     formData.append('payload', payload);
73:     if (file) {
74:       formData.append('file', file);
75:     }
76:     return this.http.put<DocumentDetailModel>(`/documents/${id}`, formData, { withCredentials: true });
77:   }
78: 
79:   submitForApproval(id: number): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
80:     return this.http.post<DocumentDetailModel>(`/documents/${id}/submit-approval`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
81:   }
82: 
83:   approve(id: number, comments: string): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
84:     return this.http.post<DocumentDetailModel>(`/documents/${id}/approve`, { comments }, { withCredentials: true });
85:   }
86: 
87:   archive(id: number): Observable<DocumentDetailModel> {
88:     return this.http.post<DocumentDetailModel>(`/documents/${id}/archive`, {}, { withCredentials: true });
89:   }
90: 
91:   preview(id: number): Observable<DocumentPreviewModel> {
92:     return this.http.get<DocumentPreviewModel>(`/documents/${id}/preview`, { withCredentials: true });
93:   }
94: 
95:   fetchContentBlob(id: number): Observable<Blob> {
96:     const url = new URL(this.contentUrl(id), window.location.origin).toString();
97:     return this.http.get(url, { responseType: 'blob', withCredentials: true });
98:   }
99: 
100:   contentUrl(id: number): string {
101:     return `${this.apiBaseUrl}/documents/${id}/content`;
102:   }
103: 
104:   downloadUrl(id: number): string {
105:     return `${this.apiBaseUrl}/documents/${id}/download`;
106:   }
107: }

168:       next: (document) => {
169:         this.selectedDocument = document;
170:         this.snackBar.open('Document archived', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 });
171:         this.reload();
172:       }
173:     });
174:   }
175: 
176:   preview(id: number): void {
177:     const actionKey = this.documentActionKey('preview', id);
178:     if (!this.startAction(actionKey)) {
179:       return;
180:     }
181:     forkJoin({ preview: this.documentCenterService.preview(id), blob: this.documentCenterService.fetchContentBlob(id) }).pipe(
182:       finalize(() => this.finishAction(actionKey))
183:     ).subscribe({
184:       next: ({ preview, blob }) => {
185:         const objectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
186:         const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(DocumentPreviewDialogComponent, {
187:           width: '960px',
188:           data: { preview, previewObjectUrl: objectUrl }
189:         });
190:         dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrl));
191:       },
192:       error: () => this.snackBar.open('Preview is unavailable for this document.', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2600 })
193:     });
194:   }
195: 
196:   requestDestruction(id: number): void {
197:     const actionKey = this.documentActionKey('request-destruction', id);
198:     if (!this.startAction(actionKey)) {
199:       return;
200:     }
201:     this.criticalActionService.create({ requestType: 'DOCUMENT_DESTRUCTION', targetType: 'DOCUMENT', targetId: id, justification: 'Document destruction requires dual approval.' })
202:       .pipe(finalize(() => this.finishAction(actionKey)))
203:       .subscribe({ next: () => this.snackBar.open('Document destruction request created', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 }) });
204:   }
205: 
206:   requestRetentionOverride(id: number): void {
207:     const actionKey = this.documentActionKey('request-retention', id);
208:     if (!this.startAction(actionKey)) {
209:       return;
210:     }
211:     this.criticalActionService.create({ requestType: 'RETENTION_OVERRIDE', targetType: 'DOCUMENT', targetId: id, justification: 'Retention override requested for controlled record.' })
212:       .pipe(finalize(() => this.finishAction(actionKey)))
213:       .subscribe({ next: () => this.snackBar.open('Retention override request created', 'Dismiss', { duration: 2200 }) });
214:   }
215: 
216:   isActionPending(actionKey: string): boolean {
217:     return this.pendingActions.has(actionKey);
218:   }
219: 
220:   draftActionKey(): string {
221:     return 'draft:create';
222:   }
223: 
224:   templateActionKey(): string {
225:     return 'template:create';
226:   }
227: 
228:   documentActionKey(action: string, id: number): string {
229:     return `${action}:${id}`;
230:   }
231: 
232:   private reload(): void {
233:     this.isLoading = true;
234:     this.loadError = '';
235:     const emptyPage = { content: [] as DocumentSummaryModel[], totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, number: 0, size: 20, first: true, last: true };
236:     forkJoin({
237:       types: this.documentCenterService.listTypes().pipe(catchError(() => of([]))),
238:       templates: this.documentCenterService.listTemplates().pipe(catchError(() => of([]))),
239:       documents: this.documentCenterService.listDocuments().pipe(catchError(() => of(emptyPage))),
240:       queue: (this.canApprove ? this.documentCenterService.approvalQueue() : of(emptyPage)).pipe(catchError(() => of(emptyPage))),
241:       archives: this.documentCenterService.archiveList().pipe(catchError(() => of([])))
242:     }).subscribe({
243:       next: ({ types, templates, documents, queue, archives }) => {
244:         this.documentTypes = types;
245:         this.templates = templates;
246:         this.documents = documents.content;
247:         this.approvalQueue = queue.content;
248:         this.archives = archives;
249:         this.isLoading = false;
250:       }
251:     });
252:   }
253: 
254:   private startAction(actionKey: string): boolean {
255:     if (this.pendingActions.has(actionKey)) {
256:       return false;
257:     }
258:     this.pendingActions.add(actionKey);
259:     return true;
260:   }
261: 
262:   private finishAction(actionKey: string): void {
263:     this.pendingActions.delete(actionKey);
264:   }
265: 
266: }

17: 
18: @RestControllerAdvice
19: public class GlobalExceptionHandler {
20: 
21:     @ExceptionHandler({AccessDeniedException.class, AuthorizationDeniedException.class})
22:     public ResponseEntity<ApiErrorResponse> handleAccessDenied(Exception ex) {
23:         return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN)
24:             .body(new ApiErrorResponse(403, "Access denied", List.of("FORBIDDEN")));
25:     }
26: 
27:     @ExceptionHandler(ApiException.class)
